mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN task t ON a.target_type = 'TASK' AND a.target_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN project p1 ON t.project_id = p1.project_id LEFT JOIN project p2 ON a.target_type = 'PROJECT' AND a.target_id = TO_CHAR(p2.project_id)

a.alarm_id AS alarmId, a.user_code AS userCode, a.alarm_tag AS alarmTag, a.alarm_content AS alarmContent, a.check_yn AS checkYn, a.alarm_date AS alarmDate, a.target_type AS targetType, a.target_id AS targetId, a.alarm_chk AS alarmChk, COALESCE(p1.project_title, p2.project_title) AS contextTitle, CASE WHEN a.target_type = 'TASK' THEN '/project/task/detail/' || a.target_id || '?projectId=' || t.project_id WHEN a.target_type = 'PROJECT' THEN '/project/outline?projectId=' || a.target_id ELSE '/notification/list' END AS redirectUrl
mapper.insert:
SELECT ALARM_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO alarm ( alarm_id, user_code, alarm_tag, alarm_content, check_yn, alarm_date, target_type, target_id ) VALUES ( #{alarmId}, #{userCode}, #{alarmTag}, #{alarmContent}, 'N', SYSDATE, #{targetType}, #{targetId} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_code AS userCode, NVL(notification_area, 'all') AS notificationArea FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm a WHERE a.user_code = #{userCode} AND a.check_yn = 'Y' AND a.check_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND check_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm SET check_yn = 'Y', alarm_chk = SYSDATE WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND check_yn = 'N'
